Follow the Prophets By Elder Waldo P. Call Of the Seventy In the Old Testament, in 2 Kings, we read of a man by the name of Naaman. He was the “captain of the host of the king of Syria, … but he was a leper” ( 2 Kgs. 5:1 ). An Israelite maid who “waited on Naaman’s wife” said: “Would God my lord were with the prophet that is in Samaria! for he would recover him of his leprosy” ( vs. 2–3 ).…
